_comment: The finalDataJson value stored in Resume.FinalData after AI generation. Same { settings, content } structure as rawData but with summary and experience descriptions professionally rewritten. This is NOT the HTTP response envelope — see SampleGenerateResponse.json for that.

content.summary: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of expertise delivering high-availability backend systems and microservices. Proven ability to lead engineering teams, architect scalable .NET solutions, and drive measurable performance improvements in cloud-native environments.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description:
• Spearheaded the migration of a monolithic REST API portfolio to ASP.NET Core microservices, improving system uptime from 98.2% to 99.9%.
• Cut average response latency by 40% through targeted architectural refactoring and query optimisation.
• Mentored a team of four engineers and established code-review standards that reduced post-release defects by 30%.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description:
• Designed and shipped 12 RESTful API endpoints consumed by 3 client applications.
• Optimised critical SQL queries to reduce dashboard load time by 25%.
• Contributed to bi-weekly code reviews that improved overall codebase test coverage to 85%.
